actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: That theory is on the edge of collapse.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A theory can be on the edge of collapse.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Theories go atop the foundations of hypotheses.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: That theory has stood the test of time.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Theories can stand the test of time.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A scientist draws a blueprint before building a house.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: A scientist draws a blueprint before building a house.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: They need blueprints drawn before they can be built.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We worked hard, and we built that theory from the ground up.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We worked hard, and we built that theory from the ground up.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: They are built from the ground up.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Remove just one brick from a building and it all comes crashing to the ground.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Remove just one brick from a building and it all comes crashing to the ground.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I'll throw a bowling ball down these equations.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: I'll throw a bowling ball down these equations.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: From time to time, you have to examine the foundation.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If you want one to stand, you need to put it on a rock solid thesis.
